divergent_child.mechanism: volatility-risk-premium/convexity proxy rather than OHLCV carry allocation
divergent_child.title: Options-implied defensive convexity ETF allocator

bad_result_policy.note: Non-rejected result; one refinement and one divergent child suggested.

refinement_child.mechanism: same allocation concept, add real yield/term-spread data if qfa supports it
refinement_child.title: ETF carry/defensive allocation with explicit macro-yield carry inputs

command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/etf-carry-defensive-allocation-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,IEF,GLD,USO,FXE,FXY,UUP --start 2022-01-03 --end 2025-12-15 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db <temporary-sqlite-db>

costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI exposes no transaction-cost/slippage parameter; reported qfa metrics are pre-cost. Ex-post sensitivity uses 5 bps one-way turnover proxy estimated from generated target-weight changes on Alpaca bars.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs were deleted after qfa JSON outputs were captured.

decision_rationale: Watchlist / not accepted: primary and random-window median Sharpe are positive pre-cost, but measured correlation to parent AR-015 retained qfa returns is high (0.7383), so orthogonality is not yet proven.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained run artifacts when available
